Insights.Text: Argentina won the first half - 12/13 Last Matches

Items.Title: Man Utd & Argentina centre-back Lisandro Martinez considered RETIRING amid injury hell | Goal.com
Items.Description: Manchester United defender Lisandro Martinez has opened up on how close he came to retirement before his World Cup heroics for Argentina.

Items.Title: Today’s Papers: Inter double deal, Milan hands on GIla, Messi magic
Items.Description: La Gazzetta dello Sport Mes-siBut what fear?Argentina through in extra-timeLEo scots his 20th World Cup goal and is decisive for the other goals: 3-2. Cape Verde incredible, fought back twice. Mbappe’s France in the round of 16 at 22.00Milan’s shorts Ramos flies, Gila reserved, Modric staysInter turn right. Sprint for Khalaili and Chalobah is now openCorriere dello Sport Inter defend themselves Khalaili, positive signals. Overtake for Chalobah Double deal | Further forward steps with Union SG, the Englishman, liked by Como, being lined up Auslilio accelerating to bring the Israeli to Chivu. The representatives of the Chelsea joker are in Milan: Trevoh has been offered. Boehly asks for 35 million Milan, hands on Gila Agreement with the defender’s agents: Lazio want 30 million Napoli’s stumble has paved the way for Cardinale: Ruben Amorim is waiting for the Spaniard. Atalanta caught off guard: Mario has stalled Percassi’s ideas, he preferred the Rossoneri. Lotito won’t make any discounts, but is looking for a new centre-back: Sergi Dominguez (Dinamo Zagreb)Germany, yes from Klopp. Salah celebrates with a chip World Cup, Jurgen is ready to become a CT. Egypt into the round of 16: Australia beaten on penalties (5-3)Bremer intrigue: Juve decide The Bayern shadow The Brazilian’s clause and the movements from the German club. Muharemovic turnaround: Could close after the weekendNapoli, the Allegri cycle begins Three-year project The tweet from De Laurentiis has arrived, Max has signed a contract until 2029. Star presentation on Tuesday 14 in San Carlo Tuttosport Kessie: ‘I’m coming!’ The Ivorian midfielder says goodbye to Al-Ahli and offers himself to Serie A: Juve want him in Turin He is a free agent and his wages would fit in with the club’s new strategy: Investing (even heavily) in young talent, while signing established players only on favourable terms. Muharemovic: White smoke close. Kolo: An increase is needed. Goretzka: Opening up againAmorim calls, Gila is there Milan, another shot The defender says yes, Napoli overtaken: Now working with Lazio. Allegri already wanted him a year agoToro also battling Juric for Okoli Leicester centre-back The ex-Atalanta man does not want to drop into the English Serie C: Dual with Monza. Ebosse intrigue Koleosho, big deal The winger to Florence Napoli-Allegri: Official. Gaetano ‘seeing’ La Dea. El Shaarawy to Saudi Arabia: 10 million per season CR7, Goncalo, chips and controversy It will be Portugal-Spain, Croatia irate The neo-Milanista Ramos scores from a Leao cross after a penalty from Ronaldo. The goal for 2-2 is ruled out in the 104th minute for an offside touch detected by the sensors Gill tries to keep out the French phenomenaThe ‘giant-killer’ with Paraguay at 22.00 The Mbappe-Olise-Dembele trio is frightening, but coach Alfaro’s  national side have already knocked out Germany. And the precedent of ‘98 …
